title: Blue Canyon 2 Tier Hanging Shower Caddy, No Drill Stainless Steel Bathroom Shelf, Non-Rusting Storage Shelves, Shower Accessory for Bathroom Organisation Shelf, Shower Basket Organizer, White
features: 【 NO-DRILL BATHROOM STORAGE 】: Blue Canyon Shower Caddy is easy to install. Our 2-tier shower shelf does not require any screws or glue. All you have to do is, hang it on your shower glass or door. This bathroom caddy can also move around if required.

【 LARGE HOLDING CAPACITY 】: Our bathroom storage shelf has three spacious compartments for triple the storage, with each tier offering abundant space to store bottles of all shapes and sizes. This corner shower caddy can carry up to 9 lbs weight.

【 STAINLESS STEEL SHOWER SHELVES 】: Blue Canyon shower organiser is made with high-quality, durable stainless steel to ensure it is corrosion free. This shower shelf is designed for easy drainage and ventilation to keep the bathroom accessories dry and clean.

【 VERSATILE SHOWER STORAGE 】: Blue Canyon bathroom storage organizer can be hung in multiple places, including the shower, bathroom, and kitchen. This hanging shower caddy can easily be hinged at the shower glass, door, and curtain rail.

【 NON-SLIP BATHROOM SHELF 】: This over the bath storage fits perfectly over the shower screen or door with a firm grip that ensures that it does not fall or tilt as you take bottles in and out for a better bath experience.
description: From the brand Previous page About Us:- Blue Canyon is a privately owned importing and distribution company, bringing both expertise and a fully managed supply chain, we believe that the little things make a big difference. We offer a wide variety of bathroom accessories that are both stylish and functional. We have everything you need to create a bathroom that is both beautiful and practical, from toothbrush holders and soap dishes to towel racks and mirrors.
